brief: Opportunities are heavily concentrated in Brooklyn R7A/R7-2 corridors, where 485-x tax exemptions combined with Section 8 VPS rents drive strong 12.4% to 13.7% cash-on-cash returns with massive land valuation headroom. Conversely, Bronx program plays under the ELLA/4% LIHTC stack yield developer fees ($216k-$280k) but show negative land headroom, making them entirely dependent on public subsidy write-downs. Queens offers selective mid-density plays, such as Beach 40 Street delivering an 11.2% cash-on-cash return.

targets.play: Develop 12 units using 485-x tax incentives and Section 8 VPS rents to capture a top-tier 13.7% cash-on-cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $591,738 provides $996,310 in headroom below the $1,588,048 walk-away threshold.
targets.risk: Confirm R7A zoning capacity and monitor the public HPD disposition process for city-owned parcels.

targets.play: Build a 10-unit residential project backed by 485-x and Section 8 VPS rents yielding a 12.7% cash-on-cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $569,141 leaves $956,661 in headroom against the $1,525,802 walk-away limit.
targets.risk: Perform physical site condition diligence and verify zoning compliance given city ownership.

targets.play: Construct 14 units via 485-x and Section 8 VPS overlay for a 12.4% cash-on-cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $690,612 provides $1,070,155 in headroom under the $1,760,767 walk-away cap.
targets.risk: Verify environmental and site conditions while preparing for competitive HPD RFP disposition.

targets.play: Target an 8-unit all-affordable ELLA / 4% LIHTC stack to realize a $280,948 developer fee.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $531,360 exceeds the $196,360 walk-away threshold by $335,000, requiring a nominal land disposition from the city.
targets.risk: High subsidy competitiveness risk for public funding awards and HPD approval.

targets.play: Deliver 14 units in Queens under 485-x with Section 8 VPS rents to achieve an 11.2% cash-on-cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $622,014 offers $909,591 in headroom below the $1,531,605 walk-away mark.
targets.risk: Verify R6A zoning parameters and public disposition timeline via EDC/HPD.

process_note: As these are screening estimates, immediate next steps require site condition checks, zoning verifications, and tracking city-owned parcels through HPD/EDC disposition RFPs rather than standard private acquisition.
disclaimer: AI interpretation of the engine's real screening output. Estimates pending diligence — not investment advice.
